programmes.show_description: One of Ireland's most unique chat shows is back as Lucy Kennedy heads off to share space, life and conversation with a host of well-known celebrities in their own homes. (SL,HD)

Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week. (HD)
